intentSynonyms: create a section group in onenote
add a section group in onenote
make a new section group in onenote
open a new section group in onenote
create a section group in a notebook in onenote
description: Create a new section group in a OneNote notebook. Section groups act as folders to organize sections within a notebook.

notebook_id.description: Notebook ID to create the section group in

display_name.description: Name for the new section group
